heading: Deauthorize an Assumed IAM Role
body:
> **Note:** Be sure to remove any associated Atlas services from the IAM role
> before you deauthorize it.

To deauthorize an AWS IAM role using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas cloudProviders accessRoles aws deauthorize <roleId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas cloudProviders accessRoles aws deauthorize](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-cloudProviders-accessRoles-aws-deauthorize).
